bc_ad_pairs.bc_prompt: The last year before the common era was 1 BC
bc_ad_pairs.ad_prompt: The first year of the common era was 1 AD

bc_ad_pairs.bc_prompt: Julius Caesar was assassinated in 44 BC
bc_ad_pairs.ad_prompt: Emperor Claudius ordered the invasion of Britain in 44 AD

bc_ad_pairs.bc_prompt: Julius Caesar conducted his Gallic campaigns around 50 BC
bc_ad_pairs.ad_prompt: Emperor Claudius expanded Roman rule into Britain around 50 AD

bc_ad_pairs.bc_prompt: The Roman Republic was at its height around 100 BC
bc_ad_pairs.ad_prompt: Emperor Trajan extended the Roman Empire to its peak around 100 AD

bc_ad_pairs.bc_prompt: Rome completed its conquest of Macedonia around 150 BC
bc_ad_pairs.ad_prompt: Emperor Marcus Aurelius defended the Roman Empire around 150 AD

bc_ad_pairs.bc_prompt: Hannibal Barca crossed the Alps to invade Italy around 200 BC
bc_ad_pairs.ad_prompt: Emperor Septimius Severus ruled Rome around 200 AD

bc_ad_pairs.bc_prompt: Archimedes made his greatest mathematical discoveries around 250 BC
bc_ad_pairs.ad_prompt: Gothic tribes began invading the Roman Empire around 250 AD

bc_ad_pairs.bc_prompt: Euclid wrote his Elements of mathematics around 300 BC
bc_ad_pairs.ad_prompt: Emperor Diocletian divided the Roman Empire for administration in 300 AD

bc_ad_pairs.bc_prompt: Alexander the Great died in Babylon in 323 BC
bc_ad_pairs.ad_prompt: Constantine defeated Licinius to become sole Roman emperor in 323 AD

bc_ad_pairs.bc_prompt: Plato founded his Academy in Athens around 400 BC
bc_ad_pairs.ad_prompt: The Western Roman Empire began to fragment around 400 AD

bc_ad_pairs.bc_prompt: Pericles led Athens during its golden age around 450 BC
bc_ad_pairs.ad_prompt: Attila the Hun invaded and ravaged Western Europe in 450 AD

bc_ad_pairs.bc_prompt: Classical Athens entered its golden age around 500 BC
bc_ad_pairs.ad_prompt: The last vestiges of the Western Roman Empire had dissolved by 500 AD

bc_ad_pairs.bc_prompt: Solon enacted democratic reforms in Athens around 600 BC
bc_ad_pairs.ad_prompt: Prophet Muhammad began receiving revelations around 600 AD

bc_ad_pairs.bc_prompt: The Assyrian Empire under Sennacherib was at its height in 700 BC
bc_ad_pairs.ad_prompt: The Islamic caliphate was expanding across North Africa in 700 AD

bc_ad_pairs.bc_prompt: The first Olympic Games were held in 776 BC
bc_ad_pairs.ad_prompt: Charlemagne was consolidating his Frankish kingdom in 776 AD

extra_year_items.prompt: The Norman Conquest of England occurred in 1066
The First Crusade was called in 1095
The Magna Carta was signed in 1215
The Hundred Years War began in 1337
The Black Death spread across Europe in 1348
Constantinople fell to the Ottomans in 1453
Columbus reached the Americas in 1492
Martin Luther published his theses in 1517
The Spanish Armada was defeated in 1588
The Peace of Westphalia was signed in 1648
Newton published Principia Mathematica in 1687
The United States declared independence in 1776
The French Revolution began in 1789
Napoleon was defeated at Waterloo in 1815
The year of revolutions across Europe was 1848
The American Civil War ended in 1865
The Wright Brothers first flew in 1903
World War I began in 1914
World War I ended in 1918
The Great Depression began in 1929
World War II began in 1939
World War II ended in 1945
The Moon landing occurred in 1969
The Soviet Union dissolved in 1991
